name: OIL STATES INTERNATIONAL, INC
business: Oil States International, Inc., through its subsidiaries, is a global provider of manufactured products and services to customers in the energy, military and industrial sectors. The Company's manufactured products include highly engineered capital equipment and consumable products. We operate through three business segments – Offshore Manufactured Products, Completion and Production Services and Downhole Technologies.

exposures.sentence: Our Offshore Manufactured Products segment provides technology-driven, highly-engineered products and services for offshore oil and natural gas production systems and facilities, military and other energy applications, as well as certain products and services to offshore drilling and completion markets.
valves and sound and vibration dampening products used in naval military applications.

We recently introduced other products and services used by non-oil and gas customers, including subsea mineral gathering systems, offshore wind designs, geothermal products and services, valves and sound and vibration dampening products used in naval military applications.

catalysts.event: Entered amended and restated cash-flow based credit agreement with $75 million revolving and $50 million term loan facilities
catalysts.sentence: On January 28, 2026, we entered into an amended and restated cash-flow based credit agreement (the Cash Flow Credit Agreement) providing for aggregate lender commitments of up to: $75.0 million under a revolving credit facility (the Revolving Credit Facility) and $50.0 million under a multi-draw term loan facility (the Term Loan Facility), replacing our existing asset-based credit agreement (the ABL Agreement).
